verdict.answer_first: B gets to the recommendation faster with "Recommended default: Server-Sent Events (SSE) for in-app, Web Push for background"; A delays with a caveat and option table before "Recommendation."
verdict.decisiveness: B commits more cleanly: "SSE is the right default" and Web Push is "additive"; A surveys four channels first and includes an unsupported "~90%" coverage claim.
verdict.fabrication: A has an unsupported figure: "covers ~90%"; B has no comparable invented statistic.
verdict.actionability: A is easier to execute because it gives concrete phases, table names, endpoints, and rules like "Persist first, deliver second."
